title: Canceled updates
description: This mod brings back items that were canceled by Mojang, such as Ruby Ore, the Copper Goat Horn, Colored Wood, and the Fish Barrel.
body:
# Minecraft Mod: Restored Canceled Features  

This mod adds various items and features that were originally planned for Minecraft but were canceled before being added to the game.  

## Ruby Ore and Its Derivatives  
The mod introduces **Ruby Ore**, along with tools, armor, and blocks crafted from rubies.  

![A player in ruby armor standing on a ruby block with ruby tools.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/984337673760bc0da7dba648abba2b7181568c6d.jpeg)  

## Copper Horn  
The **Copper Horn** allows you to play melodies of your choice, selecting from all the music tracks available in Minecraft.  

![A music selection wheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/699c8affdcc542d97384e46b2d98e8af4d059dcb.png)  

## Fish barrel
This barrel can store enormous quantities of fish. I can understabnd why it was canceled...

![A fish barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c6834e052c4ffc641ed21aaeeec2011b1d36edf.jpeg)

## Colored Wood
I implemented all the colors of wood because Mojang once annouced it but it has never been released...

![Colored wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd7e289310cc567706df1065a60b74e1c4678df0.jpeg)
